headline: Citi Sky AI Assistant Highlights Citigroup Wealth Push With Google Partnership
summary: Citi Wealth, part of Citigroup (NYSE:C), has launched Citi Sky, an AI powered digital assistant for wealth management clients. The tool is built in partnership with Google Cloud and Google DeepMind, using generative AI and real time avatar technology for client interactions. Citi Sky reflects how Citigroup is using AI in a core fee based business where client relationships and advice are central. For wealth management customers, the rollout highlights a move toward more always on digital...
